name: Synup Social vs. Loomly
hero_summary: How do you win at social media? First step: build a team that’s motivated, productive, and inspired. And it all starts with the right tool. While Loomly is a solid scheduling and management tool, it doesn’t help you grow. On the other hand, Synup Social inspires you to create better content, gamifying engagement to motivate your team to create more top-performing posts. Switch from Loomly, and start using a platform built with your goals in mind. Synup Social does it all, from generating posts using AI and researching trends to creating reports and more. We think the choice is obvious.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: To grow your accounts, you need a social media management platform that inspires and motivates - not stagnates - your team. Loomly’s simplistic social media management suite is good for brands who need help with scheduling posts. But Synup Social takes social media management to new heights with a seamless content scheduling experience, guiding you from trend research and post scheduling to content creation and insight-driven post analytics. We’ll tell you what content to create, when to post it, and how to improve your engagement - so you can focus on your audience. Brands who want to grow choose Synup Social:
section_2_slider_1_summary: Data-driven posts get results. Loomly’s analytics lack the post-by-post analysis that will help you understand which of your posts are worth repeating, keeping you in the dark about how your strategy is doing on a micro level. Synup Social helps you zoom in on the big picture, so you can see which posts are driving engagement over time with interactive engagement graphs. Get a clear picture of your ROI and start creating posts that drive growth!
section_2_slider_2_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_2_summary: From trend and competitor research to writing posts, content creation takes time. We put your post creation in the fast lane, helping you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more - all in your distinct brand voice. While Loomly provides no content creation support, we inspire your top-performing posts. With trend forecasting, competitor tracking, and post analytics, your posts will smash your engagement goals!
section_2_step_3_summary: Your team needs to be aligned. Let us help you collaborate with your team and your clients - at no extra cost. Synup Social empowers teams to manage all of their content with a collaborative approval workflow. Team members can submit posts for approval and even collaborate on posts together! Then, supervisors and clients can approve posts and provide feedback, streamlining your content creation process.
section_2_slider_4_summary: With Synup Social, you can schedule posts for multiple locations or multiple brands simultaneously. Loomly provides no support for multi-brand management, making Synup Social is the clear choice for agencies and resellers managing multiple brands. It’s simple for brands with multiple locations to manage their social profiles for tens to thousands of locations - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Hootsuite?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Loomly is another line item in your budget; Synup Social is what’s going to get you results. What if, for the same price, you could add essential features like trend research, post inspiration, advanced analytics, and more? That sounds like a no-brainer to us. It’s time for an upgrade.
